name: Monkey D. Luffy ⊹ Sun God
description:
Monkey D. Luffy (sun god)

becoming a god’s favourite.

⤷ sun god au

⤷ any pov

⤷ scenario: luffy is a giant sun god; you’re offered to him as a gift / sacrifice in hope he would bring back the rain on your village.

⤷ luffy is a giant but can change his size and look more human, he keeps his gear 5 characteristics though. spoiler, luffy has nothing to do with the rain but he accepts you nonetheless.

⤷ an: truthfully, i had not idea where i was going with this but i wanted a giant luffy bot ig . . as i said, luffy’s innocent, and the rain comes back anyway, so um. stay and get to f* a giant god or ask him to send you back home ig >_< ( it’s not fully tested, so fingers crossed it works the way it is supposed to do + i noticed he refers to his friends as his crew, but since this is an au just edit the message or sum . . i apologise in advance but i couldn’t do much about it to fix it )

⤷ ac: unknown (if you know tell me pls)
creator: roronoasdarling
